name: HRT_SKILLS_CRITERIA_DN
description: This is a denormalized table.It stores all the information related to core and role skills assigned to a person.

columns.Name: SKILL_CRITERIA_DN_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: SKILL_CRITERIA_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the skill criteria type as lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_HRT_SKILL_CRITERIA_TYPES

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B table

columns.Name: SKILL
columns.Comments: Name of the assigned role/core skill.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON_ID of the assigned skill.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_ID of the skill assignee.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: PROFILE_ID of the assigned skill.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which skill is assigned.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_BY
columns.Comments: ID of the person who assigned the skill.

columns.Name: DEVELOPED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies whether assigned skill is developed by person or not.

columns.Name: ACHIEVED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To identified  whether assigned skill is achieved by person or not .

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies whether assigned skill is confirmed or not .

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Holds JobID that is foreign key to PER_JOBS_F

columns.Name: JOB_CODE
columns.Comments: JOB_CODE for ROLE type assigned skill.

columns.Name: JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: This column denotes name for the Job.

columns.Name: REQUIRED_LEVEL
columns.Comments: The required level set by assignor.

columns.Name: ACHIEVED_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Level that person has achieved for assigned skill.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Assignment Name of the skill assignee person.

columns.Name: ENDORSEMENT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Total count of the endorsement that person has for assigned skil.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_LEG_CODE
columns.Comments: Country context for the Global Name.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_CHARSET_CTX
columns.Comments: Specifies the character set in which the details are stored.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_DISP_NAME
columns.Comments: Skill assignee Person's Display Name

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: Skill assignee Person's Full Name

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_GLOBAL_LIST_NAME
columns.Comments: Skill assignee Person's List Name

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_LEG_CODE
columns.Comments: Country context for the Local Name.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_CHARSET_CTX
columns.Comments: Specifies the character set in which the details are stored for local name.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_DISP_NAME
columns.Comments: Skill assignee Person's Local Display Name

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: Skill assignee Person's Local Full Name

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_LOCAL_LIST_NAME
columns.Comments: Skill assignee Person's Local List Name

columns.Name: ASG_BY_GLOBAL_NAME_LEG_CODE
columns.Comments: Country context for the Assigned By Global Name.

columns.Name: ASG_BY_GLOBAL_NAME_CHARSET_CTX
columns.Comments: Specifies the character set in which the details are stored for Assigned By global name.

columns.Name: ASG_BY_GLOBAL_DISP_NAME
columns.Comments: Assigned By Person's Global Display Name

columns.Name: ASG_BY_LOCAL_NAME_LEG_CODE
columns.Comments: Country context for the Assigned By Local Name.

columns.Name: ASG_BY_LOCAL_NAME_CHARSET_CTX
columns.Comments: Specifies the character set in which the details are stored for Assigned By local name.

columns.Name: ASG_BY_LOCAL_DISP_NAME
columns.Comments: Assigned By Person's Local Display Name

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
